allow: Bash(node -e 'const l = require\('\\''lucide-react'\\''\); const icons = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => typeof l[k] === '\\''object'\\'' && l[k].__TRACKED_VAR__typeof\); console.log\(icons.filter\(i => /crown|gem|paw|flag|wind|feather|trophy/i.test\(i\)\).join\('\\''\\n'\\''\)\)')

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/equipment/all.json', 'utf-8'\)\); const cats = {}; data.forEach\(item => { cats[item.category] = \(cats[item.category] || 0\) + 1; }\); console.log\('Total items:', data.length\); console.log\('\\nDistribution by category:'\); Object.entries\(cats\).sort\(\(a,b\) => b[1] - a[1]\).forEach\(\([cat, count]\) => console.log\('  ' + cat + ':', count\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/equipment/all.json', 'utf-8'\)\); const cats = ['weapon', 'armor', 'helmet', 'accessory', 'ring']; cats.forEach\(cat => { const item = data.find\(x => x.category === cat\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(item, null, 2\)\); console.log\('\\n---\\n'\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/classes/skills.json', 'utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Skills sample:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data.slice\(0, 1\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('Total skills:', data.length\); const spells = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/classes/spells.json', 'utf-8'\)\); console.log\('\\nSpells sample:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(spells.slice\(0, 1\), null, 2\)\); console.log\('Total spells:', spells.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const dataDir = 'src/data'; const stats = {}; const walk = \(dir\) => { for \(const file of fs.readdirSync\(dir\)\) { const path = dir + '/' + file; if \(fs.statSync\(path\).isDirectory\(\)\) walk\(path\); else if \(file.endsWith\('.json'\)\) { try { const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(path, 'utf-8'\)\); stats[path.replace\('src/data/', ''\)] = Array.isArray\(data\) ? data.length : 'object'; } catch \(e\) {} } } }; walk\(dataDir\); for \(const [k, v] of Object.entries\(stats\).sort\(\)\) console.log\(k + ': ' + v\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const alchemy = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/professions/alchemy-recipes.json', 'utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Alchemy recipes sample:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(alchemy.slice\(0, 1\), null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('src/data/equipment/all.json', 'utf-8'\)\); const weaponStats = new Set\(\); data.filter\(x => x.category === 'weapon'\).slice\(0, 20\).forEach\(item => { for \(const [k, v] of Object.entries\(item.stats\)\) if \(v !== null\) weaponStats.add\(k\); for \(const [k, v] of Object.entries\(item.percentages\)\) if \(v !== null\) weaponStats.add\(k\); }\); console.log\('Non-null weapon stats \(sample\):', Array.from\(weaponStats\).sort\(\).join\(', '\)\);")
